# Medicine Wheel

> A comprehensive TypeScript framework for relational healing, ceremonial inquiry, and Indigenous-aligned software development — grounded in the Four Directions, Wilson's three R's, and OCAP® data sovereignty principles.

**Version:** 0.5.1 (lockstep packages) · MCP server 4.5.0
**Language:** TypeScript (ES2022, ESM)
**License:** MIT

## Packages

- [app](.): Medicine Wheel app (`@medicine-wheel/app`) — the Next.js visual layer plus two CLIs: `mwsrv` (starts the server against a `.mw/store`, local or Docker) and `mw` (talks to the running server — status, directions, node/edge/ceremony ops); installs and runs without `@medicine-wheel/mcp`
- [ontology-core](src/ontology-core): Foundational ontology layer for the Medicine Wheel Developer Suite — unified types, RDF vocabulary, Zod schemas, constants, semantic query helpers grounded in Indigenous relational ontology
- [ceremony-protocol](src/ceremony-protocol): Ceremony lifecycle protocol — manages ceremony state, phase transitions, governance enforcement, and ceremonial review workflows
- [fire-keeper](src/fire-keeper): Fire Keeper coordination agent — tends the ceremony fire, ensures relational integrity through gating conditions, and maintains Wilson alignment as an active agent
- [community-review](src/community-review): Community-based ceremonial review protocol — implements Wilson's validation through Elder review circles, consensus-seeking, and relational accountability assessment
- [consent-lifecycle](src/consent-lifecycle): Ongoing relational consent lifecycle — consent as a living relational obligation with lifecycle tracking, renewal, renegotiation, and community-level consent protocols
- [narrative-engine](src/narrative-engine): Beat sequencing, arc validation, cadence patterns, and timeline building for the Medicine Wheel Developer Suite
- [importance-unit](src/importance-unit): ImportanceUnit — the relational unit of knowledge carrying epistemic weight, source dimensions (Land/Dream/Code/Vision), circle depth tracking, and accountability links grounded in Wilson's relational epistemology
- [relational-index](src/relational-index): Four-source epistemic dimensional indexing — Land, Dream, Code, Vision traversal with cross-dimensional mapping and spiral depth metrics
- [transformation-tracker](src/transformation-tracker): Research transformation tracking — Wilson validity criterion: if research doesn't change you, you haven't done it right. Tracks researcher, community, and relational transformation
- [graph-viz](src/graph-viz): Medicine Wheel graph visualization — circular layout with four-direction node positioning, ceremony-aware edges, and OCAP® indicators
- [relational-query](src/relational-query): Query builder, graph traversal, and accountability audit for the Medicine Wheel relational web. Protocol-aware: respects ceremony boundaries and OCAP® compliance during traversal.
- [prompt-decomposition](src/prompt-decomposition): Ontology-enriched prompt decomposition engine for the Medicine Wheel Developer Suite — intent extraction, relational dependency mapping, and ceremony-aware action stacking
- [ui-components](src/ui-components): React UI components for the Medicine Wheel Developer Suite — direction cards, beat timelines, node inspectors, OCAP® badges, and Wilson alignment gauges.
- [data-store](src/data-store): Shared Redis data-access layer for the Medicine Wheel Developer Suite — connection management, Node/Edge/Ceremony CRUD, session-ceremony linking, and discovery helpers
- [session-reader](src/session-reader): Session event reader for the Medicine Wheel Developer Suite — JSONL parsing, session summaries, analytics extraction, and search across agent session data
- [storage-provider](src/storage-provider): Abstract storage layer — a unified provider interface over JSONL and Neon/Postgres backends (with a future Redis path), selected at runtime
- [data-store-postgres](src/data-store-postgres): PostgreSQL/Neon provider scaffold — shared pool management and provider-ready storage entrypoints for cloud-backed persistence
- [ceremonial-diary](src/ceremonial-diary): Ceremonial Diary — a participant's voice across the Five-Phase ceremonial methodology; intention/observation/reflection entries with pattern detection, statistics, Markdown export, and optional projection into the chronicle wheel; persists via `@medicine-wheel/storage-provider`
- [github-ceremony](src/github-ceremony): GitHub-ceremony processing — witness GitHub webhook events (issues, PRs, merges, commits) through a ceremonial lens and record them as relational ceremony beads; pure, framework-free functions over a `@medicine-wheel/storage-provider`
- [perception-layer](src/perception-layer): Eyes & ears of agent-supported Indigenous film production — witness a belt-device recording / transcript as typed `PerceptualEvent`s and seed a production knowledge graph in ontology-core
- [narrative-cluster](src/narrative-cluster): Narrative Cluster Processor — turn witnessed perceptual events / rushes into thematic clusters, narrative beats, and a Film Edit Brief (EDL markers); deterministic; consumes perception-layer output
- [mcp](mcp): Medicine Wheel MCP Server (`@medicine-wheel/mcp`, independent 4.x line) — 70 tools across the ceremony lifecycle, relational CRUD, structural tension, narrative, Four-Directions guidance, inquiry-weaves, plan-perspectives, and validators; stdio + StreamableHTTP transports

## MCP Server & HTTP API

The `@medicine-wheel/mcp` package exposes 70 tools over two transports:

- **stdio** — `npx @medicine-wheel/mcp` (default; local JSONL store under `.mw/store/`)
- **StreamableHTTP** — `POST /api/mcp` on the running app, JSON-RPC 2.0 with `tools/list` and `tools/call`

Tool families: ceremony lifecycle (open/close, fire-keeper status, relational check-back), relational CRUD (nodes, edges, relational web), structural tension (charts, action steps, MMOT), narrative (beats, cycles, arcs), Four-Directions guidance, inquiry-weaves, plan-perspectives, and validators (Wilson paradigm, OCAP® compliance, Two-Eyed Seeing bridge, accountability).

**Server-mediated store (opt-in):** set `MW_API_URL` so the MCP tools read and write the same relational state the server holds through its REST API instead of a local file. The default `MW_DATA_DIR` JSONL path is unchanged.

The Next.js app surfaces that relational state as REST endpoints (also consumed by the MCP HTTP store):

- `GET/POST /api/nodes`, `/api/edges`, `/api/ceremonies`
- `GET/POST /api/narrative/beats`, `/api/narrative/cycles`
- `GET/POST /api/charts`, `/api/mmots`
- `GET /api/directions`, `/api/health`, `/api/resources`
- `GET/POST /api/mcp` — StreamableHTTP MCP endpoint

## Specifications (RISE Framework)

- [System Spec](rispecs/medicine-wheel.spec.md): Top-level overview linking all packages
- [ontology-core](rispecs/ontology-core.spec.md): Types, schemas, vocabulary, constants, queries
- [ceremony-protocol](rispecs/ceremony-protocol.spec.md): Ceremony state, phases, governance
- [fire-keeper](rispecs/fire-keeper.spec.md): Fire Keeper coordination agent, gating, decisions
- [community-review](rispecs/community-review.spec.md): Elder review circles, consensus, accountability
- [consent-lifecycle](rispecs/consent-lifecycle.spec.md): Consent as living obligation, lifecycle, cascade
- [narrative-engine](rispecs/narrative-engine.spec.md): Sequencing, cadence, arc, timeline, cycle
- [importance-unit](rispecs/importance-unit.spec.md): Epistemic weight, source dimensions, circle depth
- [relational-index](rispecs/relational-index.spec.md): Four-source dimensional indexing, spiral depth
- [transformation-tracker](rispecs/transformation-tracker.spec.md): Wilson validity, seven generations, reciprocity
- [graph-viz](rispecs/graph-viz.spec.md): Layout engine, SVG paths, data converters
- [relational-query](rispecs/relational-query.spec.md): Query, traversal, audit, Cypher
- [prompt-decomposition](rispecs/prompt-decomposition.spec.md): Decomposer, enricher, storage
- [ui-components](rispecs/ui-components.spec.md): React components
- [data-store](rispecs/data-store.spec.md): Redis data access, Node/Edge/Ceremony CRUD, session linking
- [session-reader](rispecs/session-reader.spec.md): Session event parsing, summaries, analytics
- [perception-layer](rispecs/perception-layer.spec.md): Belt-device witnessing, typed perceptual events, production knowledge graph
- [narrative-cluster](rispecs/narrative-cluster.spec.md): Thematic clustering, narrative beats, Film Edit Brief (EDL markers)

## Documentation

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Exhaustive reference with code samples and full API
- [rispecs/CLAUDE.md](rispecs/CLAUDE.md): Specification index
- [llms/llms-rise-framework.txt](https://llms.jgwill.com/llms-rise-framework.txt): RISE methodology guide
- [llms/llms-kinship-hub-system.md](https://llms.jgwill.com/llms-kinship-hub-system.md): Kinship hub protocol

## Key Concepts

- **Four Directions**: East (vision/Waabinong), South (growth/Zhaawanong), West (reflection/Epangishmok), North (wisdom/Kiiwedinong)
- **Wilson's Three R's**: Respect, Reciprocity, Responsibility — scored 0–1 per relation
- **OCAP®**: Ownership, Control, Access, Possession — Indigenous data sovereignty
- **Structural Tension**: Germination → Assimilation → Completion creative cycle
- **Ceremonial Inquiry**: opening → council → integration → closure phase progression

## Cross-Repository Links

- [Master LLM Index](https://llms.jgwill.com/llms-full.txt): Guidance portfolio — 40+ methodology documents including medicine-wheel package documentation
- [RISE Framework](https://llms.jgwill.com/llms-rise-framework.txt): Creative-oriented specification methodology governing all rispecs
- [Veritas](https://docs.veritas.jgwill.com/llms.txt): Formal bridge proposal maps StructuralTensionChart ↔ DigitalModel — MMOT evaluation layer for medicine-wheel's tension types
- [NarIntel](https://docs.narintel.jgwill.com/llms.txt): Narrative Intelligence Stack grounded in Four Directions inquiry — narintel's 7-role apps map East/South/West/North to narrative creation phases
